title: geophila obvallata subsp. obvallata
intro: Geophila obvallata subsp. obvallata, commonly known as creeping Jenny, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Primulaceae. It is a perennial herb that grows in damp environments and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geophila obvallata subsp. obvallata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Geophila obvallata subsp. obvallata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
